# sevalla_project (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a Sevalla project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sevalla_project" "example" {
  id = "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
}

output "project_name" {
  value = data.sevalla_project.example.display_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the project.

### Read-Only

- `company_id` (String) The company ID that owns the project.
- `created_at` (String) When the project was created.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the project.
- `name` (String) The system-generated name of the project.
- `updated_at` (String) When the project was last updated.
